title: Assignment 1 — Optimization Foundations
description: Decision variables, objective, constraints. LP formulations: 0/1 Multi-Knapsack, Set Covering, Max Independent Set.

title: Assignment 2 — LP / IP / MILP Modeling
description: Binary & integer vars, logical constraints (if-then, either-or, k-of-n), Big-M, linearizing min/max and piecewise-linear functions.

title: Assignment 3 — Bounds & Branch-and-Bound
description: Primal/dual bounds, LP relaxation, duality, complementary slackness, Lagrangian relaxation, B&B pseudocode for max problems.

title: Assignment 4 — Exact Combinatorial Algorithms
description: Brute force, DP for 0/1 knapsack, B&B on 2D IP, Constraint Programming, Benders & Dantzig–Wolfe, Branch-and-Cut/Price.

title: Assignment 5 — Heuristics & Metaheuristics
description: Approximation ratios, PTAS/FPTAS, 2-approx Vertex Cover, Christofides TSP, local search, SA, GA, Tabu, ACO, PSO, GRASP, VNS, ILS.
